title: pilosella cymosa subsp. suprafastigiata
intro: Pilosella cymosa subsp. suprafastigiata, also known as a subspecies of the Rough Hawk's Beard plant, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its sesquiterpene lactone compounds. The health benefits of Pilosella cymosa subsp. suprafastigiata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
